title: PolyMesh competitive benchmark result
description: One labeled run of one case on one solver. Files under bench/results/ may be a single object or an array of objects.

solver.description: Solver product name, e.g. PolyMesh, CalculiX, Elmer.

version.description: Solver version string (semver, package version, or unknown).

case_id.description: Stable case id matching bench/reference or competitive case catalog (e.g. lame-cylinder, kirsch-plate, timoshenko-cantilever).

dofs.description: Active degrees of freedom after BC elimination, or null if not recorded.

mesh.description: Wall seconds for meshing only; null if unknown or external mesh.

solve.description: Wall seconds for assembly + linear solve (+ recovery if included).

total.description: End-to-end wall seconds for the timed harness step.

name.description: Metric id, e.g. tip_rel_err_pct, u_r_rel_err_pct, scf_rel_err_pct.

value.description: Metric value (lower is better for *err* metrics unless noted).

unit.description: Optional unit hint (percent, ratio, Pa, m).

label.description: Git sha, release tag, or milestone id for the scoreboard x-axis (e.g. gate1-p1, abc1234).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the run.

notes.description: Optional free-text context (element type, mesh source, host).

host.description: Optional machine/CPU label for fair-time comparisons.
